deapi.description: deAPI hosted Whisper transcription with exact provider quote support

WhisperLargeV3.description: Whisper Large V3 via deAPI unified transcription endpoints

limits.notes: deAPI publishes conflicting current upload limits for audio transcription: the audiofile2txt endpoint doc lists 10 MB, while the global Limits & Quotas page lists 80 MB for audio uploads. AutoShow keeps deAPI v1 split policy note-only and relies on exact provider pricing plus retry-with-split when the upload path is rejected as too large. Supported passthrough URLs are documented for YouTube, X/Twitter, Twitch, Kick, TikTok, and X Spaces.
